product_information.description:
Omschrijving
:
Kamill Hand- & Nagelcrème Intensive is intensieve verzorging, bescherming, regeneratie en vochtinbrenging voor droge en gestreste handen.
• Extract van biologisch gecertificeerde kamille, aloë vera en avocado-olie
• Zonder kleurstoffen en dierlijke ingrediënten
• Ontwikkeld conform EU-wetgeving
• Dermatologisch getest
• Geschikt voor veganisten
Ingredienten
;
Aqua, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Se, Hydrogenated Coco-Glycerides, Cetearyl Alcohol, Persea Gratissima Oil, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Bisabolol, Glucose, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Lactic Acid, Dimethicone, Propylene Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Caprylyl Glycol, Decylene Glycol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene, Citronellol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citral, Coumarin, Geraniol.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Aqua, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Se, Hydrogenated Coco-Glycerides, Cetearyl Alcohol, Persea Gratissima Oil, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Bisabolol, Glucose, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Lactic Acid, Dimethicone, Propylene Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Caprylyl Glycol, Decylene Glycol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene, Citronellol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citral, Coumarin, Geraniol.
